words.def: a road junction at which traffic streams circularly around a central island
words.zh: a. 旋轉的, 輪流的

words.def: the products of human creativity; works of art collectively
words.zh: n. 藝術, 人文科學, 技術, 巧妙, 詭計, 美術

words.def: earnest and conscientious activity intended to do or accomplish something
words.zh: n. 嘗試, 試驗, 審理, 審判

words.def: a column of light (as from a beacon)
words.zh: n. 光線, 射線, 閃爍, 光輝

words.def: an artifact designed to be played with
words.zh: n. 玩具, 小玩藝兒, 小型的東西, 消遣

words.def: any of various long-tailed rodents similar to but larger than a mouse
words.zh: n. 鼠, 卑鄙的人, 破壞者, 變節者
